decisions.title: Cold Storage Architecture: Build vs Buy Decision
decisions.context: ENG-9395 spike exploring cold storage read service. Critical for scaling Sift Edge and reducing costs at enterprise scale. Impacts 2026 'Build the Moat' pillar.

arguments.for: Custom solution enables optimal compression for telemetry data, better cost control, competitive differentiation for Sift Edge
arguments.against: Off-shelf solutions (S3 Glacier, Azure Archive) faster to market, proven reliability, lower maintenance burden

decisions.title: Global Nav UX: Ship New Pattern or Iterate Current
decisions.context: ENG-9126 building prototypes for testing. Affects Explore V2 and Canvas navigation patterns. Core to 'Nail the Core' - navigation impacts decision capture velocity.

arguments.for: New pattern could reduce clicks-to-decision by 30%, better supports multi-workspace workflows critical for enterprise
arguments.against: Retraining cost for existing users, engineering investment delays Python Rules GA, may not significantly impact North Star metric

decisions.title: Parquet Schema Standardization: Adopt Industry Standard vs Custom
decisions.context: ENG-9255 designing Parquet schema. Foundational for Ask SIFT data pipeline and third-party integrations. 'Embed Deeper' strategy depends on seamless data exchange.

arguments.for: Industry standard (Apache Arrow) enables broader ecosystem integration, faster partner onboarding, reduces documentation burden
arguments.against: Custom schema optimized for telemetry time-series could be 40% more efficient, better compression, domain-specific advantages

decisions.title: Table Feature Completeness: GA Now or Add Advanced Features
decisions.context: ENG-9277 table improvements pre-GA. Multiple precision/data type issues (ENG-9103, ENG-9347, ENG-7228). North Star: does table view capture more decisions?
decisions.blockedBy: Numeric precision issues (MAX_SAFE_INT warnings) not resolved; data type support incomplete; UX warnings not implemented

arguments.for: Ship GA to capture feedback, iterate based on usage data, competitive pressure from new entrants in decision intelligence space
arguments.against: Precision errors break trust with engineering users, incomplete features create support burden, damages 'Nail the Core' credibility

decisions.title: Authentication Strategy: Keycloak FIPS vs Alternative IAM
decisions.context: ENG-9302 enabling FIPS for Keycloak, ENG-8293 session redirect loop, ENG-9464 event log retention. Auth issues blocking enterprise deployments. 'Embed Deeper' requires enterprise-grade security.
decisions.blockedBy: Session expiration redirect loop unresolved; FIPS certification timeline unclear

arguments.for: Keycloak open-source, customizable, supports all compliance requirements if hardened properly
arguments.against: Persistent stability issues, session management fragile, enterprise vendors (Okta, Auth0) offer faster compliance path and proven reliability

decisions.title: Performance Budget: Address Chrome Crashes or Limit Data Scale
decisions.context: ENG-9138 high CPU/Chrome crashes on hover with high-rate telemetry. Directly impacts North Star - users can't make decisions if app is unusable. Affects Sift Edge viability.

arguments.for: Implement hard limits on visualization density, sampling, virtualization - protects 90% of users from edge cases
arguments.against: Core value prop is handling high-rate telemetry; limits feel like product regression; competitive disadvantage vs specialized tools

timeAudit.weekSummary: High meeting load driven by architecture decisions (cold storage, Parquet, auth). Critical bugs consuming unplanned capacity. Need decision on Table GA to unblock team.
alerts: 6 critical decisions pending; 2 blocked by technical debt
Chrome crash bug (ENG-9138) affecting 15% of enterprise trial users
Keycloak auth issues delaying 3 enterprise deployments
Table GA blocked by 4 precision/data type issues
Global nav prototype testing scheduled but design not finalized
Only 20% calendar time available for strategic work this week
